Event: Sweet Hustle
Event Date: 07/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM170


Other locations the gear can be found
Hustle Challenge
Sweet Hustle Amulet

Once in a while, the unit casts a shield that absorbs 1500000 damage of any type and lasts for up to 5,5 sec. When the shield absorbs damage, the amulet wearer freezes the attacker for 1,5 sec. That enemy is unable to move or attack for 1,5 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 1,5 sec. The ability freezes enemies up to once per 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚
